sections.paragraph:
αἰτίζω 1 aor. pass. ᾐτίσθην (Hom. et al.) beg φοβούμενοι μή τι αἰτισθῶσιν ὑπʼ αὐτῶν afraid that they might be begged for someth. by them Hs 9, 20, 2.—DELG s.v. αἰτέω.

aor. aor. = aorist

pass. pass. = passive (either of grammatical form or of passive experience); also used in reference to literary portion=passage

Hom Hom , VIII b.c.—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

someth. someth. = something

Hs Hs = Similitudes

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 31
